# Captains Fish and Chicken
> Fresh fish, chicken & seafood — made to order in Cedar Rapids

## NAP
- Name: Captains Fish and Chicken
- Address: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
- Phone: +1-319-221-1040
- Email: captainsfishchicken@gmail.com

## Hours
Mon–Thu 11am–10pm · Fri–Sat 11am–11pm · Sun 11am–8pm (please call to confirm)

## Domain
https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app

## Key Facts
- Cuisine: Seafood, Fried Chicken, Soul Food
- Price range: $$

## Menu
- Boneless Chicken Bites: Boneless Wings Meal (8 pcs) (Meal $12.99), Boneless Wings Meal (12 pcs) (Meal $18.99), Boneless Wings Only (20 pcs) (Only $26.99), Boneless Wings Only (30 pcs) (Only $49.99), Boneless Wings Only (50 pcs) (Only $79.99)
- Chicken Leg & Thigh Mix: Chicken Mix Meal (4 pcs) (Meal $12.99), Chicken Mix Meal (6 pcs) (Meal $15.99), Chicken Mix Meal (10 pcs) (Meal $24.99), Chicken Mix Only (20 pcs) (Only $39.99), Chicken Mix Only (30 pcs) (Only $59.99), Chicken Mix Only (50 pcs) (Only $89.99)
- Chicken Tenders: Tenders Meal (3 pcs) (Meal $12.99), Tenders Meal (6 pcs) (Meal $21.99), Tenders Meal (10 pcs) (Meal $34.99), Tenders Only (20 pcs) (Only $59.99)
- Desserts: Cheesecake (Each $3.99), Caramel Cheesecake (Each $3.99), Carrot Cake (Each $3.99), Caramel Coconut (Each $3.99), Lemon Cake (Each $3.99)
- Drinks: Water (Each $0.99), Mystic (Each $3.99), Calypos (Each $3.99)
- Family Meals & Combo Dinners: Captain's Family Meal Deal (Deal $59.99), Combo Dinner — Your Choice of Two Items (Combo $18.99), Combo Dinner — Your Choice of Three Items (Combo $21.99)
- Fish Only Family Deals: Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (10 pcs) (Family $49.99), Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (20 pcs) (Family $69.99), Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (30 pcs) (Family $99.99), Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (40 pcs) (Family $139.99), Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (50 pcs) (Family $166.99), Catfish Nuggets, Half Pan (Pan $49.99), Catfish Nuggets, Full Pan (Pan $89.99)
- Gizzards & Livers: Gizzards (1 lb) (Meal $13.99), Livers (1 lb) (Meal $13.99)
- Kids Meals: Kids Chicken Nuggets (5 pcs) (Kids $6.99), Kids Chicken Tenders (2 pcs) (Kids $6.99), Kids Pizza Puff (Kids $6.99)
- Party Wings: Party Wings Meal (8 pcs) (Meal $14.99), Party Wings Meal (12 pcs) (Meal $18.99), Party Wings Only (16 pcs) (Only $24.99), Party Wings Only (20 pcs) (Only $28.99), Party Wings, Chicken Only (30 pcs) (Only $45.99), Party Wings, Chicken Only (50 pcs) (Only $79.99)
- Seafood: Catfish Fillet, Perch or Tilapia (2 pcs) (Meal $13.99), Catfish Fillet, Perch or Tilapia (3 pcs) (Meal $16.99), Catfish Fillet, Perch or Tilapia (4 pcs) (Meal $21.99), Catfish Steak, Bone In (2 pcs) (Meal $13.99), Catfish Steak, Bone In (3 pcs) (Meal $15.99), Catfish Steak, Bone In (4 pcs) (Meal $19.99), Catfish Nuggets (1 lb) (Meal $14.99), Cod Fish, Wild Caught (2 pcs) (Meal $14.99), Cod Fish, Wild Caught (3 pcs) (Meal $19.99), Cod Fish, Wild Caught (4 pcs) (Meal $23.99), Crab Cakes (4 pcs) (Meal $14.99), Red Snapper (2 pcs) (Meal $14.99), Red Snapper (3 pcs) (Meal $19.99), Red Snapper (4 pcs) (Meal $23.99)
- Shrimp: Jumbo Shrimp, 1/2 lb (7 pcs) (Meal $15.99), Jumbo Shrimp, 1 lb (14 pcs) (Meal $25.99), Medium Shrimp (1/2 lb) (Meal $13.99), Medium Shrimp (1 lb) (Meal $21.99), Shrimp Basket (Basket $10.99)
- Side Orders: Hush Puppies (10 pcs) (Side $6.99), Breaded Mushrooms (10 pcs) (Side $6.99), Mac and Cheese Bites (10 pcs) (Side $6.99), Cheese Sticks (5 pcs) (Side $6.99), Cheese Curds (Side $6.99), Pizza Puff (Side $6.99), Onion Rings (10 pcs) (Side $6.99), Small Fries (Side $3.99), Large Fries (Side $6.99), Half Pan of Fries (Pan $16.99), Full Pan of Fries (Pan $27.99), Extra Sauce (Add-on $0.50), Gizzards or Livers (side) (Side $7.99), Catfish Nuggets (side) (Side $7.99), Wings (1 pc, side) (Each $2.45), Legs (1 pc, side) (Each $3.99), Thighs (1 pc, side) (Each $3.99)
- Whole Wings: Wings Meal (4 pcs) (Meal $8.99), Wings Meal (6 pcs) (Meal $13.99), Wings Meal (10 pcs) (Meal $19.99), Wings Only (20 pcs) (Only $32.99), Wings Only (30 pcs) (Only $49.99), Wings Only (50 pcs) (Only $84.99), Wings Only (100 pcs) (Only $159.99)
